research-best-practices.description: Research best practices for a technology or pattern
research-best-practices.template: Research current best practices for {{topic}}. Include: official docs, community consensus, common pitfalls, and 3 concrete code examples.

implement-feature.description: Implement a scoped feature or component
implement-feature.template: Implement {{feature}} in the workspace. Follow existing code style, add tests if a test framework is present, and report what files were changed.

debug-error.description: Debug a specific error or failing behavior
debug-error.template: Debug the following error in the workspace: {{error}}. Find root cause, propose a minimal fix, and verify the fix works.

review-pr.description: Review a set of changes for quality and risks
review-pr.template: Review the current git diff (or files: {{files}}) for: bugs, security issues, style violations, and missing tests. Provide a structured report.

browser-test.description: Test a web page or user flow in the browser
browser-test.template: Open {{url}} in a browser, test the user flow: {{flow}}. Report any console errors, broken elements, or visual regressions. Take screenshots if possible.

quick-audit.description: Quick health audit of the repo
quick-audit.template: Run a quick audit of this repo: check for missing tests, outdated dependencies, security issues in package files, and any broken build commands.
